title: Dry nose solutions for smokers: 9 herbal essential oils
description: Thymus vulgaris essential oils, also known as thyme oil, is a natural remedy for dry nose due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. It contains constituents like thymol and carvacrol, which help combat bacterial and viral infections that can cause dryness and congestion. When used in a diffuser or applied topically with a carrier oil, thymus vulgaris essential oils can help reduce swelling and mucus production, making it easier to breathe.
